items.briefing:
Microsoft has released patches fixing 137 security vulnerabilities this month, including a critical flaw in Netlogon — a core Windows authentication service. Australian organisations should treat this as urgent and ensure Windows systems are updated as soon as possible.

Separately, cybersecurity experts are questioning whether measures in this week's Federal Budget adequately address the growing threat of AI-powered cyberattacks. If your organisation hasn't recently reviewed its cybersecurity practices or staff awareness training, now is a good time to do so.

**Practical tip:** Check with your IT team today that the latest Microsoft security updates have been applied to all work devices.
